transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: First National Bank, you're through to David.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi David, I need help figuring out why my salary hasn't shown on my balance. My employer usually pays on the first and it's now the second.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Not a problem. I'll need to verify your identity first. Can I take your full name and date of birth please?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: It's Kofi Asante, seventh of February 1979.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Kofi. Now, it looks like there may be an issue with the BACS payment. When was the first — a weekday?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's exactly the situation — I should have asked that immediately rather than suggesting there was a problem. When the first falls on a weekend, BACS salary payments automatically roll to the next working day. Your salary should arrive by midday today. I apologise for implying otherwise.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Ah, I didn't know that. I've been panicking for nothing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Completely understandable. Is there anything else I can help with?

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: No, that's very reassuring. Thanks David.

planted_violations: initially implied there was a potential issue without first gathering basic information about the payment date
